color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Keystone reframe: blow the thin 'tool call' up 100x
into the agent OS syscall layer -- the one boundary where
an untrusted process (the model) asks the trusted kernel (DOS)
to touch the world, exactly like int 0x80 for a Unix process

span.p:
Verdict comes from something the agent did NOT author --
git, the file tree, the clock, a schema -- never the model's narration
